redis-memory-mcp.description: Persistent cross-session memory with semantic search + KV store. 8 tools: kv_set, kv_get, kv_delete, kv_list, mem_save, mem_search, mem_list, mem_delete.
capabilities: kv_set — store key/value fact (instant, no embeddings)
kv_get — retrieve value by exact key (O(1) lookup, refreshes TTL)
kv_list — list key/value entries with tag/pattern filtering
mem_save — save fact with vector embedding for semantic search
mem_search — find facts by meaning (cosine similarity)
mem_list — browse memories sorted by recency
mem_delete — permanently delete a semantic memory

infrastructure.redis: Redis Stack with RediSearch module (for vector HNSW index)

redis-memory-mcp.setup: docker compose up -d (starts Redis Stack + TEI + initializes HNSW index)
